name: Urlbox
description: Best-in-class URL → screenshot/PDF/MP4 rendering API. Handles JS rendering, custom viewports (incl. retina), mobile emulation, dark mode, ad blocking, custom CSS/JS injection, full-page captures, and PDF export. Synchronous and async render endpoints.

tools.name: render_sync
tools.description: Capture a screenshot or PDF synchronously and return the render URL immediately. Use this for small, fast renders. For large pages or PDFs, use render_async + poll. Common formats: png, jpeg, webp, pdf, html, mhtml.

html.description: Render raw HTML instead of a URL — mutually exclusive with `url`

full_page.description: Capture the entire scrollable page, not just the viewport

thumb_width.description: Resize the output to this width (preserves aspect)

thumb_height.description: Resize the output to this height (preserves aspect)

mobile.description: Use a mobile user agent + viewport

block_ads.description: Block ad networks via uBlock-style filters

wait_until.description: When to consider the page 'ready' before capturing

wait_for.description: CSS selector to wait for before capturing

delay.description: Extra delay in ms after wait_until is satisfied

click.description: CSS selector to click before capturing

css.description: Custom CSS to inject into the page

js.description: Custom JavaScript to execute on the page

selector.description: Capture only the element matching this CSS selector

authorization.description: HTTP Authorization header value to send to the target site

cookie.description: Cookie header to send to the target site

tools.name: render_async
tools.description: Submit a render job asynchronously. Returns a job id immediately — poll the status URL in the response to retrieve the render. Use this for slow renders (large PDFs, full-page captures of complex sites, MP4 captures).

webhook_url.description: URL to POST to when the render is complete
